steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The question asks which occupational field has the “highest incorporated self-employment rate.” Scan the table's Incorporated self-employment rate column and identify the largest percentage.

steps.title: Match the value to the correct field
steps.content: Management, business, and financial services shows 8.9% incorporated self-employment—the highest rate in the column. Construction and resource extraction (4.4%), sales and related (5.8%), and installation, maintenance, and repair (2.7%) all show lower rates. That matches choice D — D is correct.
